theme.description: Cinematic, editorial, slow-luxury. Think The Row meets Toteme with a moonlit mysticism. The brand identity is rooted in artisanal craftsmanship, quiet luxury, and moonlit aesthetics.

colors.primary_description: Deep midnight navy - used for primary backgrounds and dark sections.
colors.secondary_description: Warm ivory/cream - used for primary text, light surfaces, and high contrast elements.
colors.accent_description: Brushed gold - used sparingly for buttons, hover underlines, subtle halos, and luxury accents.
colors.muted_description: Soft slate - used for secondary text, borders, and muted UI elements.
colors.background_gradient: none - rely on solid #0B0E1A with subtle CSS noise texture overlays.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F5F0E8]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-light tracking-tight text-[#F5F0E8]

typography.custom_rules: Headlines must never be bold; use font-light or font-normal to maintain the slow-luxury, editorial feel. Never center-align paragraphs.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-12 to p-32). Focus on negative space to create a premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Asymmetrical bento grid for editorial sections. Avoid perfect symmetry. Mix large hero spans with smaller detail shots.
spacing_and_layout.hero_section: Full bleed with maximum 40% black overlay (bg-black/40) to let the image breathe. Navbar sits on top with glassmorphism.

interactions_and_motion.transitions: Smooth, slow ease-in-out transitions. transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1)]

hover_effects.nav_links: Gold underline animation on hover (scale-x from 0 to 1).
hover_effects.product_cards: Hover zoom on image (scale-105) + soft gold glow/halo effect (shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(201,169,110,0.15)]).
hover_effects.buttons: Dark navy buttons with gold text/accents. On hover, slight lift and border glow.

interactions_and_motion.scroll_effects: Staggered fade-up for product cards (framer-motion). Navbar shrinks in height and applies backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B0E1A]/60 on scroll.
interactions_and_motion.cursor: Custom dark dot cursor on desktop (implement globally via fixed div tracking mouse).

components.navbar: Sticky fixed top-0 w-full z-50. Logo centered. Links on left (Shop, About). Icons on right (Search, Cart, Account).
components.buttons: Sharp edges or minimal rounded (rounded-sm). bg-[#0B0E1A] border border-[#C9A96E]/50 text-[#C9A96E] hover:bg-[#C9A96E] hover:text-[#0B0E1A] transition-colors duration-300.
components.product_card: No visible card background. Image is the hero. Text below image: Title in serif, price in sans-serif, muted slate. Hovering over image triggers soft gold halo.
components.cart_drawer: Slide-in from right. bg-[#0B0E1A] with frosted glass overlay if possible. Clean item list with elegant typography.
components.noise_overlay: Fixed absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay z-0 (use an SVG filter or small noise PNG) applied to hero and dark sections.

hero_background.description: Atmospheric, cinematic portrait of a woman with blowing hair. Moonlit and moody.

products.name: Loom Linen Trousers
products.description: Minimalist luxury long beige coat/trousers setting.

products.name: Waxing Shirt
products.description: Elegant grey coat/shirt in moody studio setting.

products.name: Eclipse Wrap
products.description: Woman in luxurious brown silk wrap against dark background.

editorial_and_craft.description: White silk on black background, perfect for 'moonlit' fabric texture showcases.
Close up of a traditional wooden loom with threads, ideal for the About/Craft values page.
